blended.narrative: Silver Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.2 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,546 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.4" of new snow over the past week. Base has been melting — down 3" over the past week. Current depth: 30".
